title: Elytra Auto Equip
description: A mod that automatically starts flying if you are going to fall to your death
body:
# Elytra Auto Equip

A mod to save your ass 
(well its saved me so it HAS to work, right?)

this mod detects when you are falling onto a solid block and equips your elytra and starts flying 

warning: this mod could be considered as cheating. ask for permission before using on servers
